title: carlina frigida subsp. renatae
intro: Carlina frigida subsp. renatae, also known as the Carline Thistle or Alpine Carline Thistle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carlina frigida subsp. renatae include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is typically used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
